🧭

This is an independent, non-profit guide compiled by travel enthusiasts to provide the most objective information about visiting Yeonggeumjeong. It is free, and we are affiliated with no organization.

← Back to home

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026

1. Information Collection

We generally do not actively collect users' personal identity information. Any information you provide via contact forms or email will be kept strictly confidential.

2. Use of Information

Information we collect is used only to provide, maintain and improve our services and to communicate with you. We will not sell or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.

3. Cookies & Tracking

We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to record activity on the site and store certain information. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to alert you when a cookie is sent.

4. Data Security

Your data security matters to us. We take commercially reasonable measures to protect your personal data, though no internet transmission is 100% secure.

🎯 Our Mission

So that every traveler who visits Sokcho does not miss the stunning sunrise over the East Sea, we have gathered scattered official information into this guide — purely to give you the most authentic viewing and cultural experience.

Yeonggeumjeong
